message:
fix(security): deep audit wave 2 - Telegram, Google, PostgreSQL, BigQuery, DuckDB

Telegram: custom Debug impl redacts bot token credential; percent-encode
file_path in file_download_url() to prevent path traversal.

Gmail: sanitize_path_segment() for message_id, thread_id, draft_id (5 sites).
Google Docs: sanitize_path_segment() for document_id (2 sites).
Google Sheets: sanitize_path_segment() for spreadsheet_id (5 sites);
replaced broken custom urlencoded() (only 3 chars) with proper
percent-encoding via encode_range().

PostgreSQL: percent-encode schema/table params in query strings (3 sites).
BigQuery: sanitize_path_segment() for project_id, dataset_id (4 sites).
DuckDB: sanitize_path_segment() for db_name, table_name, query_id (5 sites).

New tests: ~60+. All connectors verified passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
